title: conyza halimifolia
intro: Conyza halimifolia, also known as annual fleabane, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Conyza halimifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
